videos.headline: Big man gets the handoff for a Florida 1st down
videos.description: Florida's Desmond Watson uses all 449 lbs to power in for the first down on third and one vs. Tulane.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Big man gets the handoff for a Florida 1st down) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tulane's flea-flicker ends in an INT
videos.description: Tulane tries the flea-flicker as Ty Thompson chucks it deep, but it ends up being picked off by Florida's Trikweze Bridges.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tulane's flea-flicker ends in an INT) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ Lagway gets picked off by Tulane's Kevin Adams III
videos.description: DJ Lagway doesn't see Kevin Adams III, who steps in front and picks off the pass for a turnover.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (IDJ Lagway gets picked off by Tulane's Kevin Adams III) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dickson Agu picks off DJ Lagway in the end zone
videos.description: DJ Lagway throws it into the end zone and gets intercepted by Tulane's Dickson Agu.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dickson Agu picks off DJ Lagway in the end zone) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida comes up with INT off fortunate bounce
videos.description: Florida takes advantage off of a lucky bounce as Alfonzo Allen Jr. makes the catch to come up with an interception vs. Tulane.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida comes up with INT off fortunate bounce) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tony Livingston finds the end zone for Florida
videos.description: DJ Lagway makes a short pass to Tony Livingston who gets into the end zone to pad Florida's lead vs. Tulane.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tony Livingston finds the end zone for Florida) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida turns fumble into TD in bizarre sequence
videos.description: KD Daniels picks up a fumbled snap and dashes in for a Florida touchdown vs. Tulane.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida turns fumble into TD in bizarre sequence) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Anthony Rubio seals the win for Florida with a TD
videos.description: Anthony Rubio puts the icing on the cake with a late touchdown for Florida vs. Tulane.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Anthony Rubio seals the win for Florida with a TD) 2024/12/20 ESHEET
